mapper.select: select count(*) from users where id = #{id} and pw = #{pw}
mapper.insert: insert into users values(#{id}, #{pw}, users_seq.nextval, #{name}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{oriname}, #{ssn_hash}, #{ssn_enc}, #{ssn_masked}, #{zonecode}, #{address1}, #{address2}, 'USER', 'ACTIVE', #{hire_date}, null, #{dept_seq}, #{rank_seq}, sysdate, null, #{sysname})
mapper.select: SELECT u.*, d.dept_name, r.rank_name from users u LEFT JOIN departments d ON u.dept_seq = d.dept_seq LEFT JOIN "RANK" r ON u.rank_seq = r.rank_seq WHERE u.id = #{id}

select u.id as id, u.name as name, u.sysname as sysname, d.dept_name as dept_name, r.rank_name rank_name, u.role as role from users u left join departments d on u.dept_seq = d.dept_seq left join rank r on u.rank_seq = r.rank_seq where id = #{loginId}
